prompt: An ornate printed receipt from “Kapalıçarşı Baharatçı” (Grand Bazaar Spice Merchant) in Istanbul, Turkey. Items include: 100g Saffron: ₺120.00, 250g Sumac: ₺25.00, 1 Hand-carved spice jar: ₺65.00. Total: ₺210.00. The receipt uses both Turkish lira signs and intricate border art, printed on tan thermal paper with a gold foil shop logo. It rests on a colorful woven textile.
prompt_refined: An ornate printed receipt from 'Kapalıçarşı Baharatçı' (Grand Bazaar Spice Merchant) in Istanbul, Turkey. The receipt is on tan thermal paper, featuring a prominent gold foil shop logo at the top and intricate border art throughout. It clearly lists: 100g Saffron: ₺120.00, 250g Sumac: ₺25.00, and 1 Hand-carved spice jar: ₺65.00. The total is ₺210.00, with all prices using Turkish lira (₺) signs. The receipt rests flat on a vibrantly colored, patterned woven textile.
objects: 'Kapalıçarşı Baharatçı' shop name on the receipt
Tan thermal paper texture on the receipt
